---
applyTo: "app.vue,nuxt.config.*,pages/**/*.vue,layouts/**/*.vue,components/**/*.vue,composables/**/*.js,composables/**/*.ts,server/**/*.js,server/**/*.ts,plugins/**/*.js,plugins/**/*.ts,middleware/**/*.js,middleware/**/*.ts"
description: "Apply the repository's Nuxt guidance."
---

Canonical Nuxt guidance lives in `.ai/skills/nuxt/SKILL.md` and `.ai/rules/project-architecture.md`.

Use Nuxt conventions first, keep routes static-friendly and GitHub Pages friendly, and keep page-level metadata close to the homepage, embed, or legal route that owns it.
